name: Reyes
manager_notes: Reyes missed two deadlines this month, and the second one slipped without a heads-up. Rather than walking in and framing it as a reliability problem — last time I came down hard it backfired and he went quiet for weeks — I want to understand what is going on underneath the slips. It could be workload, unclear ownership, motivation, or something outside work. I would like to explore that before treating this as a performance issue.
answers: Yeah, the deadlines got away from me, I know.
The second one I should have flagged earlier, that's on me.
Honestly there's been a lot landing on me at once.
Some of it I wasn't even sure who actually owned.
It hasn't been a great few weeks outside work either, if I'm honest.
I don't think I'm in over my head, it just piled up.
Clearer priorities would help me not drop things.
I want to get back to being someone you can count on.
Knowing you're not writing me off would honestly take the pressure down.
